segments.en: We've been busy, so we don't have many openings in the near future.
segments.zh: 我们最近很忙，所以近期没有太多空位。

segments.en: We've just had a cancellation for tomorrow morning at 10.30, so I could fit you in then
segments.zh: 我们刚刚取消了明天上午10:30的预约，所以那时候可以为您安排

segments.en: with your usual dentist, Dr. James.
I've also got an opening with Dr. Manganielo on Thursday at 7.45 AM.
segments.zh: 我还有周四早上7:45与Manganielo医生的预约空位。

segments.en: Oh, it looks like Dr. Shah has had a cancellation today, so we could fit you in with her at noon.
segments.zh: 哦，看起来Shah医生今天取消了预约，所以中午可以为您安排她。

segments.en: If none of those work for you, I could probably get you in to see Dr. Manelo this Friday at
segments.zh: 如果这些都不行的话，我可能可以在周五下午3点为您安排Manelo医生。

segments.en: You'd be his last appointment for the day.
segments.zh: 那将是他当天的最后一个预约。

segments.en: Now mark your answer on your answer sheet.
segments.zh: 现在请在答题纸上标记答案。
